# Tula's Institute, Dehradun

> Tula's Institute is a premier private engineering and management college established in 2006 by Rishabh Educational Trust, located in Dehradun, Uttarakhand, India. The institute is NAAC A+ accredited, NBA accredited, AICTE approved, UGC recognized, and ISO 9001:2008 certified. It is affiliated to Uttarakhand Technical University (UTU) and Sri Devsuman Uttarakhand University. Ranked among the Top 50 Private Engineering Colleges in India and 86th by Times B-School rankings.

## Address

Tula's Institute, Dhoolkot, Post Office: Selaqui, Chakrata Road, Dehradun - 248011, Uttarakhand, India

## Contact

- Admissions Helpline: +91-9837983721
- Website: https://tulas.edu.in/

## About

Tula's Institute is spread over a 20-acre lush green campus with state-of-the-art infrastructure including modern auditorium (500+ seating), high-tech computer labs (500+ desktops), world-class library (50,000+ volumes, 5,800+ e-books, NPTEL resources), virtual labs, skill development center, fully Wi-Fi enabled campus, hostels, multi-cuisine cafeteria, gymnasium, ATM, and medical facilities. The institute has 150+ experienced faculty members and focuses on industry-oriented education with practical learning.

## Accreditations & Rankings

- NAAC A+ Accredited (Highest in Uttarakhand)
- NBA Accredited
- AICTE Approved
- UGC Recognized
- ISO 9001:2008 Certified
- Ranked 86th by Times B-School in India
- Ranked among Top 50 Private Colleges in India
- 65th Best Engineering College in India by Outlook
- Ranked in Top 20 Private Engineering Colleges of North India

## Undergraduate Programs (UG)

- B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (CSE)
- B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering
- B.Tech in Civil Engineering
- B.Tech in Electrical & Electronics Engineering
- B.Tech in Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE)
- B.Tech Lateral Entry (3-year program)
- Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA)
- Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA)
- Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com)
- Bachelor of Science (B.Sc) in Agriculture / Forestry
- Bachelor of Journalism & Mass Communication (BA JMC / BJMC)
- B.Pharm (Pharmacy)
- Polytechnic / Diploma Courses

## Postgraduate Programs (PG)

- M.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering
- M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering (Thermal)
- M.Tech in Civil Engineering (Structural)
- Master of Business Administration (MBA)
- Master of Computer Applications (MCA)

## Admission Information

- B.Tech: Minimum 45% in 10+2 with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects; admission based on JEE Main / UKSEE counseling or merit
- M.Tech: B.E./B.Tech with minimum 50-60% marks; valid GATE score or UTU entrance exam required
- MBA: Graduation with minimum 50% marks; CAT / MAT / XAT scores considered
- BBA / BCA / B.Com: Minimum 45% in 10+2 examinations
- MCA: Relevant undergraduate degree required
- Admissions open for 2026 academic session
- Online and offline admission modes available

## Fee Structure

- B.Tech: Approximately INR 1.10 Lakh per year (varies by specialization)
- MBA: Approximately INR 3.10 Lakh total
- Total tuition fees range: INR 70,000 - INR 5,02,000 depending on course
- Hostel fees: INR 92,500 (regular room) / INR 1.28 Lakh (AC room)
- Scholarships available based on merit and special categories
- Education loan and financial aid assistance provided

## Placements & Industry Connections

- 650+ recruiting companies associated with the institute
- Highest package: INR 30 LPA (Computer Science & Engineering)
- Minimum packages around INR 4 LPA with near 100% placement rate
- Active Training & Placement Cell with year-round placement activities
- Top recruiters include: Wipro, Oracle, ITC, Samsung, Amazon, Cummins, Deutsche Bank, Fiserv, HCL, Aditya Birla, Infosys, Berger Paints, Asahi India Glass, Apollo Munich, Microtek, Bosch, Vivo
- Corporate collaborations with Microsoft, D-Link, RedHat, Bentley
- Summer and winter internship programs mandatory for all students
- MoUs with ICT Academy, Slog Solutions, BizMerlin for student training

## Campus Facilities

- 20-acre campus with modern infrastructure
- Library: 50,000+ volumes, digital library, NPTEL section, reference section
- Computer Centre: 500+ desktops with 24/7 Wi-Fi
- Auditorium: 500+ seating, fully AC, state-of-the-art
- Hostels: 4 male and 2 female hostels with 24/7 CCTV, power backup, heated water
- Multi-cuisine cafeteria
- Gymnasium and sports facilities
- Guest house, ATM, transportation, medical facilities
- Virtual labs and skill development center
- CAD/CAM centres and engineering workshops
- Microsoft Innovation Centre
- D-Link Academic Campus Connect Programme
- Remote Robotics Lab (in association with APS Labs, Aachen, Germany)
- Centre for Innovation, Incubation and Entrepreneurship Development

## Student Life & Activities

- Annual cultural festival: "Sanskriti"
- Annual technical festival: "Utkrisht"
- Multiple student clubs and committees
- NCC programmes
- Guest lectures and industry workshops
- Entrepreneurship Development Cell
- Sports and extracurricular activities
- Leadership and teamwork development programs

## Key Differentiators

- Only college in Uttarakhand with strategic tie-ups with Microsoft, RedHat, D-Link, and Bentley
- First college in India to introduce Remote Robotics Lab in association with APS Labs, Aachen, Germany
- Microsoft Innovation Centre on campus
- Industry-oriented syllabus with focus on Cloud, Mobile, and core technologies
- International academic collaborations for cultural and academic exchange
- 25+ research papers published in reputed journals
- 300+ alumni working in private and government sectors
- MoUs with Krishi Vigyan Kendra and agricultural development centers

## Vision & Mission

- Vision: To be an educational centre of excellence of multi-ethnicity and diversity
- Mission: To promote intellectual and skilled human capital generating employment and entrepreneurship; to establish as a technology-driven teaching-learning institution; to provide a world-class platform for research and innovation
